rows.notes: Top-of-page title clearly written as 'II (Capital) 1895'. No monetary columns aligned with this text and it functions as a section header.
Description legible as 'Local Rates Comp. Fund'. Numeric columns are well-aligned to the right ruling lines; pounds '9', shillings '15', pence '6' clearly written and all values within valid ranges.
Description reads 'Bad debts, written off.' The pounds column shows '26' with dot markers in the shillings and pence columns indicating zero; alignment with vertical rules is clear.

Subtotal line (no descriptive text on the same line) showing '35 15 6'. Placement immediately beneath the two entries and a short red rule indicates this is a calculated total; digits are clear and validate (9/15/6 + 26/0/0 = 35/15/6).

Description reads as 'Balance at close of acct.' Amount '5493 3 6' aligned in the main money columns. Numerals are smaller but legible; slight uncertainty only in smallness of the thousands digit strokes, chosen reading '5493' based on alignment and spacing.

Final total shown with a decorative '£' and the figures '5528 19' with a small dot in the pence column. Interpreted as 5528 pounds, 19 shillings, 0 pence. This matches arithmetic (35/15/6 + 5493/3/6 = 5528/19/0). Slight uncertainty due to the dot in the pence place (interpreted as zero pence).
